summary:
Claim: Fibroblasts in cell-rich zones primarily secrete type I collagen.  
Evidence: - Type I collagen constitutes up to 80% of total collagen in dense connective tissues like skin and tendon. - Fibroblasts are the main producers of extracellular matrix components during tissue repair and regeneration.  
Answer: A
